description: The Rosmini are a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, controlling the neighborhoods of Ciccarello, Modena, and San Giorgio. They have strong ties to the De Stefano family and extensive interests in Lombardy. The clan has been involved in the second 'ndrangheta war and is known for controlling public contracts in Reggio Calabria. Key members include Diego Rosmini, who held the rank of 'santa', and Antonio Rosmini, arrested in 2004 after a decade-long fugitive status.
